title: Arboreal Ascent
description: Climb tree trunks as if they were ladders!
body:
A simple mod that allows climbing tree trunks as if they were ladders. Simply face a tree's trunk and walk into it, and you'll start climbing upwards - identically to how ladders work.

Works best with a mod like [Passable Foliage](https://modrinth.com/mod/passable-foliage) to make leaves passable.

Inspired by ReikaKalseki's [TreeClimbing](https://github.com/ReikaKalseki/TreeClimbing) - however, this mod was coded completely independently.
